name: Tanvi Patel

education.institution: Dhirubhai Ambani Institute of Information and Communication Technology (DAIICT), Gandhinagar

institution: Dhirubhai Ambani Institute of Information and Communication Technology (DAIICT), Gandhinagar

experience.title: Software Development Engineer (Backend)
responsibilities: Developed payment reconciliation microservice in Go, processing ₹5,000 Crore+ monthly transactions with 99.97% accuracy.
Implemented distributed tracing (Jaeger + OpenTelemetry) across 12 services, cutting MTTR from 45min to 8min.
Designed and deployed a webhook retry engine using Kafka DLQ + exponential backoff, reducing merchant webhook failure rate from 4.2% to 0.3%.
Built internal CLI tool (Go) for developer environment setup — adopted by 200+ engineers, saving 3+ hours per onboarding.
Achieved 95% test coverage across owned services using Go's testing package and testcontainers.

experience.title: Open Source Contributor – The Julia Language
responsibilities: Contributed 18 PRs to Julia's HTTP.jl library adding streaming response support and compression middleware.
Wrote comprehensive documentation and benchmark comparisons published on the Julia Discourse forum.

cloud: AWS (EC2, RDS, S3, Lambda, SQS, CloudWatch, Route 53)

projects.name: Sentinel – Lightweight APM Tool
projects.description: Built an open-source Application Performance Monitoring tool that auto-instruments Go HTTP servers. 800+ GitHub stars. Featured on Go Weekly newsletter issue #492.

projects.name: PgMigrate – Safe PostgreSQL Migration CLI
projects.description: A zero-downtime PostgreSQL schema migration tool inspired by Flyway. Supports dry-run, rollback, and audit logging. 200+ weekly downloads from GitHub Releases.

Google Summer of Code 2021 – selected from 8,900+ applicants (acceptance rate ~4%)
